subject: English
overall_learning_objectives: Understand the storyline and message of the lesson 'Wisdom Paves the Way'
Analyse how wisdom and careful thinking help resolve conflicts
Identify the main characters and their roles in the story
Interpret the theme and moral of the lesson
Develop comprehension, discussion, and vocabulary skills

lesson_plan.title: Understanding Wisdom and Its Importance
topics_covered: Importance of patience and thoughtful thinking
student_activities: Discuss situations where wisdom is needed
Share personal examples of solving problems wisely

lesson_plan.title: Reading the Story and Identifying Characters
student_activities: Create a character list with their qualities

lesson_plan.title: Analysing the Conflict
teaching_strategy: Teacher explanation using examples from the text
student_activities: Identify the problem faced in the story
Discuss possible solutions before reading the resolution

lesson_plan.title: Resolution and Moral Interpretation
topics_covered: Understanding the moral of the lesson
student_activities: Write the moral of the story
Discuss how wisdom helps in real-life situations

lesson_plan.title: Language Skills and Revision
student_activities: Write a short summary of the story

teacher_tip: Encourage students to analyse how the characters use wisdom to resolve the conflict. Discuss how the same approach can be applied to everyday situations.
